nodes.name: Acridotheres
nodes.summary: Acridotheres（Acridotheres）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联11种鸟类，如家八哥、黑翅椋鸟、红嘴椋鸟等11种鸟类。

nodes.name: 林八哥
nodes.summary: The great myna (Acridotheres grandis), also known as the white-vented myna, is a species of starling in the family Sturnidae. Its range extends from Sikkim across Northeast India and Indochina. Description It is black with elongated forehead feathers, forming a frontal crest that may curl backwards. Its beak and feet are yellow. It has white from the vent to the tip of the tail and a white wing patch. Images References
